## Integrated Free Art References

This prototype currently uses freely accessible preview art gathered from public itch.io asset pages to improve presentation while the gameplay systems are still under construction.

### Current sources

- `assets/external/kamisama/header.png`
  Source page: `https://kamisama887.itch.io/horror-lab-top-down`
  Usage: main menu banner.

- `assets/external/kamisama/og_image.png`
  Source page: `https://kamisama887.itch.io/horror-lab-top-down`
  Usage: main menu backdrop and low-opacity level backdrop.

- `assets/external/kamisama/screenshot_1.png`
  Source page: `https://kamisama887.itch.io/horror-lab-top-down`
  Usage: low-opacity laboratory room reference art inside level presentation.

### Notes

- Replace these preview-based presentation assets with full downloaded packs when final production art is selected.
- Keep final commercial licensing aligned with the chosen pack's license terms before shipping.
